channel.title: My Article Podcast
channel.description: Audio versions of interesting articles converted to MP3 for easy listening

item.title: Machines of Loving Grace: How AI Could Transform the World for the Better
item.description: Audio version of Dario Amodei's essay on the positive potential of powerful AI, covering biology, neuroscience, economic development, and governance.

channel.ns1:author: Skyentific
channel.ns1:summary: Audio versions of interesting articles converted to MP3 for easy listening

item.title: The Persona Selection Model: Why AI Assistants might Behave like Humans
item.description: Audio version of Anthropic Alignment Science Blog post. This episode explores the Persona Selection Model (PSM), the idea that LLMs learn to simulate diverse characters during pre-training, and post-training elicits and refines a particular Assistant persona.

item.title: 2026 is the Year Our Comfort Ends - ConsumeNote Archive
item.description: Audio version of archived article from ConsumeNote. A brief reflection on the year 2026 marking the end of an era of comfort.

item.title: Majority of CEOs Report Zero Payoff from AI Splurge - The Register
item.description: Audio version of The Register article by Dan Robinson. PwC survey of 4,454 business leaders finds 56 percent of CEOs see neither revenue growth nor cost savings from AI investments.

item.title: What Next for Chinese Open-Source AI - MIT Technology Review
item.description: Audio version of MIT Technology Review article by Caiwei Chen. Chinese open-source AI models like DeepSeek, Qwen, and Kimi are spreading globally.

item.title: The Adolescence of Technology - Dario Amodei
item.description: Audio version of Dario Amodei essay exploring AI risks including autonomy, bioweapons, authoritarianism, economic disruption.
